panels.description: Current average CPU utilization across all monitored VMs.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "% Processor Time"
| where InstanceName == "_Total"
| summarize AvgCPU = round(avg(CounterValue), 1) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| summarize round(avg(AvgCPU), 1)

panels.title: Avg CPU %

panels.description: 95th percentile CPU utilization — represents near-peak load.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "% Processor Time"
| where InstanceName == "_Total"
| summarize round(percentile(CounterValue, 95), 1)

panels.title: P95 CPU %

panels.description: Peak CPU utilization observed in the selected time range.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "% Processor Time"
| where InstanceName == "_Total"
| summarize round(max(CounterValue), 1)

panels.title: Max CPU %

panels.description: Number of VMs with average CPU above 90% critical capacity.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "% Processor Time"
| where InstanceName == "_Total"
| summarize AvgCPU = avg(CounterValue) by Computer
| where AvgCPU > 90
| summarize CriticalVMs = count()

panels.title: VMs > 90% CPU

panels.description: Number of VMs with average CPU above 70% — elevated load.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "% Processor Time"
| where InstanceName == "_Total"
| summarize AvgCPU = avg(CounterValue) by Computer
| where AvgCPU > 70
| summarize ElevatedVMs = count()

panels.title: VMs > 70% CPU

panels.description: Total VMs reporting CPU performance data.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "% Processor Time"
| where InstanceName == "_Total"
| summarize dcount(Computer)

panels.title: CPU Monitored VMs

panels.description: Average, P95, and Max CPU utilization across all VMs over time.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "% Processor Time"
| where InstanceName == "_Total"
| summarize
    Avg = round(avg(CounterValue), 1),
    P95 = round(percentile(CounterValue, 95), 1),
    Max = round(max(CounterValue), 1)
    by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: CPU Utilization Aggregate Trend

panels.description: CPU utilization broken out per virtual machine. Identify which VMs are driving load.

azureLogAnalytics.query: Perf | where CounterName == "% Processor Time" | where InstanceName == "_Total" | summarize AvgCPU = round(avg(CounterValue), 1) by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m) | order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: CPU Utilization — Per VM

panels.description: Shows CPU usage over time split into total, user (application), and privileged (system) activity, helping identify whether load is driven by applications or the operating system.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where ObjectName == "Processor Information"
| where CounterName in ("% Processor Time", "% User Time", "% Privileged Time")
| where InstanceName == "_Total"
| summarize AvgValue = avg(CounterValue) by CounterName, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

azureResourceGraph.query:
Perf
| where ObjectName == "Processor"
| where CounterName in ("% Processor Time", "% User Time", "% Privileged Time")
| where InstanceName == "_Total"
| summarize avg(CounterValue) by CounterName, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)

panels.title: CPU Usage Breakdown — Application vs System

panels.description: Detailed CPU breakdown per VM with percentile statistics. Click Computer name to open Azure Portal.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
Perf
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where CounterName == "% Processor Time"
| where InstanceName == "_Total"
| summarize
    Avg = round(avg(CounterValue), 1),
    P50 = round(percentile(CounterValue, 50), 1),
    P90 = round(percentile(CounterValue, 90), 1),
    P95 = round(percentile(CounterValue, 95), 1),
    Max = round(max(CounterValue), 1),
    Samples = count()
    by Computer
| order by Avg desc

panels.title: CPU Statistics per VM

panels.description: Current average committed memory in use across all VMs.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use"
| summarize round(avg(CounterValue), 1)

panels.title: Avg Memory %

panels.description: 95th percentile memory utilization.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use"
| summarize round(percentile(CounterValue, 95), 1)

panels.title: P95 Memory %

panels.description: Peak memory utilization observed.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use"
| summarize round(max(CounterValue), 1)

panels.title: Max Memory %

panels.description: VMs with average memory above 90%.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use"
| summarize AvgMem = avg(CounterValue) by Computer
| where AvgMem > 90
| summarize count()

panels.title: VMs > 90% Memory

panels.description: VMs with average memory above 70%.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use"
| summarize AvgMem = avg(CounterValue) by Computer
| where AvgMem > 70
| summarize count()

panels.title: VMs > 70% Memory

panels.description: Average available memory in megabytes across all VMs.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "Available MBytes"
| summarize round(avg(CounterValue), 0)

panels.title: Avg Available MB

panels.description: Average, P95, and Max memory utilization over time.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use"
| summarize Avg = round(avg(CounterValue), 1), P95 = round(percentile(CounterValue, 95), 1), Max = round(max(CounterValue), 1)  by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Memory Utilization — Aggregate Trend

panels.description: Memory utilization per virtual machine.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use"
| summarize AvgMem = round(avg(CounterValue), 1) by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Memory Utilization — Per VM

panels.description: Detailed memory breakdown per VM.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
Perf
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use"
| summarize
    Avg = round(avg(CounterValue), 1),
    P50 = round(percentile(CounterValue, 50), 1),
    P90 = round(percentile(CounterValue, 90), 1),
    P95 = round(percentile(CounterValue, 95), 1),
    Max = round(max(CounterValue), 1),
    Samples = count()
    by Computer
| order by Avg desc

panels.title: Memory Statistics per VM

panels.description: Available memory in MB per VM — low values indicate memory pressure.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
Perf
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where ObjectName == "Memory"
| where CounterName == "Available Bytes"
| summarize
    AvgGB = round(avg(todouble(CounterValue)) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024, 2),
    MinGB = round(min(todouble(CounterValue)) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024, 2),
    P5GB = round(percentile(todouble(CounterValue), 5) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024, 2),
    P10GB = round(percentile(todouble(CounterValue), 10) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024, 2),
    arg_max(TimeGenerated, CounterValue)
    by Computer
| project
    Computer,
    AvgGB,
    MinGB,
    P5GB,
    P10GB,
    CurrentGB = round(todouble(CounterValue) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024, 2)
| order by AvgGB asc

panels.title: Available Memory per VM

panels.description: Average disk space used across all logical disks. not current

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;

Perf
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where ObjectName == "LogicalDisk"
| where CounterName == "% Free Space"
| extend UsedPct = 100.0 - todouble(CounterValue)
| summarize AvgUsedPct = round(avg(UsedPct), 1) by Computer
| order by AvgUsedPct desc

panels.title: Avg Disk Used %

panels.description: 95th percentile disk space used.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;

Perf
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where ObjectName == "LogicalDisk"
| where CounterName == "% Free Space"
| extend UsedPct = 100.0 - todouble(CounterValue)
| summarize P95UsedPct = round(percentile(UsedPct, 95), 1)

panels.title: P95 Disk Used %

panels.description: Peak disk space used on any single volume.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;

Perf
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where ObjectName == "LogicalDisk"
| where CounterName == "% Free Space"
| extend UsedPct = 100.0 - todouble(CounterValue)
| summarize MaxUsedPct = round(max(UsedPct), 1)

panels.title: Max Disk Used %

panels.description: Number of disk volumes with average usage above 90%.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where ObjectName == "LogicalDisk"
| where CounterName == "% Free Space"
| where InstanceName != "_Total"
| extend UsedPct = 100.0 - CounterValue
| summarize AvgUsed = avg(UsedPct) by Computer, InstanceName
| where AvgUsed > 90
| summarize count()

panels.title: Volumes > 90%

panels.description: Average disk read operations per second across all VMs.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "Disk Reads/sec"
| summarize round(avg(CounterValue), 1)

panels.title: Avg IOPS (Reads)

panels.description: Average disk write operations per second across all VMs.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "Disk Writes/sec"
| summarize round(avg(CounterValue), 1)

panels.title: Avg IOPS (Writes)

panels.description: Average and P95 disk space used across all volumes over time.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where ObjectName == "LogicalDisk"
| where CounterName == "% Free Space"
| extend UsedPct = 100.0 - CounterValue
| summarize Avg = round(avg(UsedPct), 1), P95 = round(percentile(UsedPct, 95), 1), Max = round(max(UsedPct), 1) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Disk Space Used % — Aggregate Trend

panels.description: Disk read and write operations per second over time.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "Disk Reads/sec"
| summarize Reads = round(avg(CounterValue), 1) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

Perf
| where CounterName == "Disk Writes/sec"
| summarize Writes = round(avg(CounterValue), 1) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Disk IOPS — Reads vs Writes

azureLogAnalytics.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where Name == "TransferLatencyMs"
| extend TagsJson = parse_json(Tags)
| extend Drive = tostring(TagsJson["vm.azm.ms/mountId"])
| where isnotempty(Drive)
| summarize AvgLatencyMs = avg(Val) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), Computer, Drive
| extend Series = strcat(Computer, " / ", Drive)
| project TimeGenerated, Series, AvgLatencyMs
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.description: Disk space utilization per VM and mount point. Shows which volumes are running low.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
Perf
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where ObjectName == "LogicalDisk"
| where CounterName == "% Free Space"
| extend UsedPct = 100.0 - CounterValue
| summarize
    AvgUsed = round(avg(UsedPct), 1),
    MaxUsed = round(max(UsedPct), 1),
    AvgFreePct = round(avg(CounterValue), 1),
    MinFreePct = round(min(CounterValue), 1)
    by Computer, InstanceName
| order by AvgUsed desc

panels.title: Disk Space per VM / Volume

panels.description: Average network throughput (total bytes/sec) across all VMs.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "Bytes Total/sec"
| summarize round(avg(CounterValue) / 1024 / 1024, 2)

panels.title: Avg Throughput

panels.description: Average bytes sent per second.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "Bytes Sent/sec"
| summarize round(avg(CounterValue) / 1024 / 1024, 2)

panels.title: Avg Sent

panels.description: Average bytes received per second.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "Bytes Received/sec"
| summarize round(avg(CounterValue) / 1024 / 1024, 2)

panels.title: Avg Received

panels.description: Maximum network throughput observed.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "Bytes Total/sec"
| summarize round(max(CounterValue) / 1024 / 1024, 2)

panels.title: Peak Throughput

panels.description: Number of distinct network interfaces reporting data.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where ObjectName == "Network Adapter" or ObjectName == "Network"
| where CounterName == "Bytes Total/sec"
| summarize dcount(InstanceName)

panels.title: NICs Reporting

panels.description: Number of VMs reporting network telemetry.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "Bytes Total/sec"
| summarize dcount(Computer)

panels.title: VMs Reporting

panels.description: Network bytes sent and received over time.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "Bytes Sent/sec"
| summarize Sent = round(avg(CounterValue) / 1024 / 1024, 3) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

Perf
| where CounterName == "Bytes Received/sec"
| summarize Received = round(avg(CounterValue) / 1024 / 1024, 3) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Network — Sent vs Received (MB/s)

panels.description: Total network throughput per VM.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "Bytes Total/sec"
| summarize Throughput = round(avg(CounterValue) / 1024 / 1024, 3) by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Network Throughput — Per VM (MB/s)

panels.description: Network throughput breakdown per VM.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
Perf
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where CounterName in ("Bytes Sent/sec", "Bytes Received/sec", "Bytes Total/sec")
| summarize Value = avg(CounterValue) by Computer, CounterName
| extend ValueMB = round(Value / 1024 / 1024, 3)
| project Computer, CounterName, ValueMB
| evaluate pivot(CounterName, take_any(ValueMB))
| project-rename Sent_MBps = ["Bytes Sent/sec"], Received_MBps = ["Bytes Received/sec"], Total_MBps = ["Bytes Total/sec"]
| order by Total_MBps desc

panels.title: Network Statistics per VM

panels.description: Number of Virtual Machines that have sent a heartbeat signal in specified dashboard time. A heartbeat confirms that monitoring agents is running and the machine is reachable.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated between($__timeFrom..$__timeTo)
| summarize dcount(Computer)

panels.title: VMs Online

panels.description: Virtual Machines ghat reported telemetry in the last specified dashboard time frame but not have sent a heartbeat in 15 minutes. These machines may be shutdown, have failed agent or have lost network connectivity.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let allVMs = Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated between ($__timeFrom .. $__timeTo)
| distinct Computer;
let recentVMs = Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(15m)
| distinct Computer;
allVMs
| where Computer !in (recentVMs)
| summarize OfflineVMs = count()

panels.title: VMs Offline

panels.description: Shows the average number of minutes since each computer last reported a heartbeat. Useful for identifying delays or gaps in agent reporting across the environment.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Heartbeat
| summarize LastBeat = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer
| extend AgeMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastBeat)
| summarize round(avg(AgeMinutes), 1)

panels.title: Avg Heartbeat Age

panels.description: The longest gap between now and the most recent heartbeat from any single VM. This surfaces the single stalest machine in the environment. Values above 15 minuets warrant investigation.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Heartbeat
| summarize LastBeat = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer
| extend AgeMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastBeat)
| summarize round(max(AgeMinutes), 1)

panels.title: Max Heartbeat Age

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated between ($__timeFrom .. $__timeTo)
| summarize VMs = dcount(Computer) by Category

Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
| summarize VMs = dcount(Computer) by OSType

Heartbeat
| summarize Heartbeats = count() by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

Heartbeat
| summarize LastBeat = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| extend AgeMins = datetime_diff('minute', bin(now(), 5m), LastBeat)
| project Computer, TimeGenerated, AgeMins
| order by TimeGenerated asc

let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
let allHeartbeats = Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime);
allHeartbeats
| summarize
    LastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated),
    HeartbeatCount = count(),
    OSType = take_any(OSType),
    AgentVersion = take_any(Version),
    AgentCategory = take_any(Category),
    ComputerIP = take_any(ComputerIP)
    by Computer
| extend
    AgeMins = datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastHeartbeat),
    Status = iff(datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastHeartbeat) <= 15, "Online", "Offline")
| project Computer, Status, AgeMins, LastHeartbeat, HeartbeatCount, OSType, AgentCategory, AgentVersion, ComputerIP
| order by AgeMins desc

panels.description: Total count of vms exceeding cirtical thresholds on any metric

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let cpuHot = Perf
| where CounterName == "% Processor Time" and InstanceName == "_Total"
| summarize AvgCPU = avg(CounterValue) by Computer
| where AvgCPU > 90
| project Computer;
let memHot = Perf
| where CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use"
| summarize AvgMem = avg(CounterValue) by Computer
| where AvgMem > 90
| project Computer;
let diskHot = Perf
| where ObjectName == "LogicalDisk" and CounterName == "% Free Space" and InstanceName != "_Total"
| extend UsedPct = 100.0 - CounterValue
| summarize AvgDisk = avg(UsedPct) by Computer
| where AvgDisk > 90
| project Computer;
union cpuHot, memHot, diskHot
| distinct Computer
| summarize CriticalVMs = count()

panels.title: Critical Hotspots

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let cpuWarn = Perf
| where CounterName == "% Processor Time" and InstanceName == "_Total"
| summarize AvgCPU = avg(CounterValue) by Computer
| where AvgCPU between (70.0 .. 90.0)
| project Computer;
let memWarn = Perf
| where CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use"
| summarize AvgMem = avg(CounterValue) by Computer
| where AvgMem between (70.0 .. 90.0)
| project Computer;
let diskWarn = Perf
| where ObjectName == "LogicalDisk" and CounterName == "% Free Space" and InstanceName != "_Total"
| extend UsedPct = 100.0 - CounterValue
| summarize AvgDisk = avg(UsedPct) by Computer
| where AvgDisk between (75.0 .. 90.0)
| project Computer;
union cpuWarn, memWarn, diskWarn
| distinct Computer
| summarize WarningVMs = count()

let allVMs = Perf
| where CounterName == "% Processor Time" and InstanceName == "_Total"
| distinct Computer;
let hotVMs = Perf
| where CounterName == "% Processor Time" and InstanceName == "_Total"
| summarize Avg = avg(CounterValue) by Computer
| where Avg > 70
| project Computer;
let memHot = Perf
| where CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use"
| summarize Avg = avg(CounterValue) by Computer
| where Avg > 70
| project Computer;
let diskHot = Perf
| where ObjectName == "LogicalDisk" and CounterName == "% Free Space" and InstanceName != "_Total"
| extend Used = 100.0 - CounterValue
| summarize Avg = avg(Used) by Computer
| where Avg > 75
| project Computer;
let unhealthy = union hotVMs, memHot, diskHot | distinct Computer;
allVMs
| where Computer !in (unhealthy)
| summarize HealthyVMs = count()

let cpu = Perf
| where CounterName == "% Processor Time" and InstanceName == "_Total"
| summarize CPU = avg(CounterValue) by Computer;
let mem = Perf
| where CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use"
| summarize Mem = avg(CounterValue) by Computer;
let disk = Perf
| where ObjectName == "LogicalDisk" and CounterName == "% Free Space"
| extend Used = 100.0 - CounterValue
| summarize Disk = avg(Used) by Computer;
cpu
| join kind=leftouter mem on Computer
| join kind=leftouter disk on Computer
| extend Score = round(
    (coalesce(CPU, 0.0) + coalesce(Mem, 0.0) + coalesce(Disk, 0.0)) / 3.0,
    1
)
| top 1 by Score desc
| project Computer, Score

let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
let cpu = Perf
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where CounterName == "% Processor Time" and InstanceName == "_Total"
| summarize CPU = round(avg(CounterValue), 1) by Computer;
let mem = Perf
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use"
| summarize Memory = round(avg(CounterValue), 1) by Computer;
let disk = Perf
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where ObjectName == "LogicalDisk" and CounterName == "% Free Space"
| extend Used = 100.0 - CounterValue
| summarize Disk = round(avg(Used), 1) by Computer;
let net = Perf
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where CounterName == "Bytes Total/sec"
| summarize NetMBps = round(avg(CounterValue) / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) by Computer;
cpu
| join kind=leftouter mem on Computer
| join kind=leftouter disk on Computer
| join kind=leftouter net on Computer
| extend Score = round((
    coalesce(CPU, 0.0) +
    coalesce(Memory, 0.0) +
    coalesce(Disk, 0.0)
) / 3.0, 1)
| project Computer, Score, CPU, Memory, Disk, NetMBps
| order by Score desc

let topVMs = Perf
| where CounterName == "% Processor Time" and InstanceName == "_Total"
| summarize CPU = avg(CounterValue) by Computer
| top 5 by CPU desc
| project Computer;
Perf
| where CounterName == "% Processor Time" and InstanceName == "_Total"
| where Computer in (topVMs)
| summarize CPU = round(avg(CounterValue), 1) by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Hotspot Trend — Top 5 VMs by CPU
